column6: Same number on both Prox/Leaf sides of card.
Cards: 50d8-Lk10015 = DESFire EV2 LEAF Smart Cards with MGH custom keys and Partner's Common keys

Mass Gen. Hospital is part of the Partner's Hospital transition strategy. Part of Lk10015 is unique to MGH, and part is common to other Partner's Hospitals.

Kc1 - Kc8: Unique MGH keys

Kc9 - Kc16: Common Partner's Hospital keys
LEAF_CC_NEWTON_WELLESLEY_Lk10031

Reader's programmed with CMG1 will only have one key, Kc1 (MGH unique). They will not have a Partner's Hospitals key.
